name: vela
description: Headless Web Components for trading interfaces

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vela-trading/core && npm run build -w @vela-trading/order-book && npm run build -w @vela-trading/price-ticker && npm run build -w @vela-trading/trade-feed && npm run build -w @vela-trading/adapters && npm run build -w @vela-trading/depth-chart && npm run build -w @vela-trading/candlestick-chart && tsc --build
